fields.description: e.g. http://localhost:2785 (where the OpenWA Docker container runs)
fields.label: OpenWA Base URL

fields.description: X-API-Key created in the OpenWA dashboard
fields.label: API Key

fields.description: The OpenWA session (WhatsApp account) to send from
fields.label: Session ID

fields.description: Number: 9876543210@c.us — or a group: 1203630XXXXXXX@g.us (get group IDs from the OpenWA dashboard)
fields.label: Default Recipient Chat ID

fields.description: Digits only, e.g. 91. Prefixed to employee mobile numbers that don't already include a country code.
fields.label: Default Country Code

fields.description: Enable processing of incoming WhatsApp messages via OpenWA webhook
fields.label: Webhook Enabled

fields.description: Secret key for verifying OpenWA webhook HMAC signatures. Set the same value in OpenWA webhook configuration.
fields.label: Webhook Secret

fields.description: Automatically reply to invoice requests from authorised employees
fields.label: Auto-Reply Enabled

fields.description: Comma-separated list of roles allowed to use the auto-reply bot. Leave empty to allow all active employees. Example: Sales Manager,Sales User,Marketing User
fields.label: Allowed Roles

fields.description: Comma-separated keywords that trigger invoice PDF fetch (case-insensitive).
fields.label: Invoice Keywords

fields.description: Comma-separated keywords that trigger customer ledger fetch (case-insensitive).
fields.label: Ledger Keywords

fields.description: Print format to use for Invoice PDF replies. Leave blank for default.
fields.label: Invoice Print Format

fields.description: Current connection status of the WhatsApp session
fields.label: Session Status
fields.options:
ready
connected
qr_ready
disconnected
created
unknown
error

fields.label: QR Code (scan with WhatsApp on phone)
fields.options:
Configure settings on the left, then click Refresh Status & QR at the top.

The QR code will appear here automatically when the session is ready to pair.

fields.label: Notify On
fields.options:
IN and OUT
IN only
OUT only

fields.description: Sends to the employee's Mobile (cell_number on the Employee record). Verify numbers first — salary data is sensitive.
fields.label: Send Salary Slip PDF to employee on submit

fields.description: Leave blank for the default format
fields.label: Salary Slip Print Format

fields.description: When enabled, all WhatsApp notifications go to the Test Chat ID below instead of employee phones. Use for testing without disturbing employees.
fields.label: Test Mode

fields.description: Chat ID to receive test notifications (e.g., 919106526195@c.us for Mitesh). Only used when Test Mode is enabled.
fields.label: Test Chat ID
